differential_diagnoses: AL Amyloidosis with renal and cardiac involvement
Proliferative glomerulonephritis with monoclonal immunoglobulin deposits (PGNMID)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) exacerbated by salt sensitivity
next_steps: Perform renal biopsy with immunofluorescence and electron microscopy
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid cardiomyopathy
Serum albumin and comprehensive metabolic panel
Bone marrow biopsy for investigation of monoclonal plasma cell clone
Cardiac MRI if echocardiography is inconclusive for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Adjust diuretics with close hemodynamic monitoring
